# Vivek Transportt

> India's logistics marketplace for booking verified trucks for parcels across Maharashtra, and for truck owners to earn on a transparent commission.

Vivek Transportt connects shippers with background-checked truck owners. Customers get instant quotes, GPS tracking, and on-time delivery. Truck owners get guaranteed backhauls, 48-hour payments, and a fixed 4% commission.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Book a truck, view fleet types, register as a truck owner, and contact info.
